paper_title: RoBERTa: A Robustly Optimized BERT Pretraining Approach

raw_extraction.innovation: RoBERTa improves BERT pretraining by training longer with larger batches, removing the Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) objective, using longer sequences, and applying dynamic masking patterns during training
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Underperformance of BERT due to suboptimal hyperparameter tuning and training setup
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Single-task fine-tuning on downstream tasks (GLUE, SQuAD, RACE)
raw_extraction.paper_title: RoBERTa: A Robustly Optimized BERT Pretraining Approach

raw_extraction.innovation: RoBERTa LARGE expands on RoBERTa with a larger architecture (L=24, H=1024, A=16), larger byte-level BPE vocabulary (50K units), and extended pretraining over 160GB of text for 500K steps, achieving state-of-the-art performance on GLUE and SQuAD
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Underperformance of BERT due to suboptimal hyperparameter tuning and training setup
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) removed
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Single-task fine-tuning on downstream tasks (GLUE, SQuAD, RACE)
